'''Til''' was a [[Star/Legends|star]] located in the [[Til system/Legends|Til system]],<ref name="GG12" /> deep within the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the technologically advanced [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Tililix]], which was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Tarro]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Nearly a [[100 BBY/Legends|century]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Til [[Destruction of Til|exploded]] with little warning, destroying Tililix in the process.<ref name="UAA" />

Only those Tarro who were off-world at the [[Time/Legends|time]] survived the cataclysm, with the remaining members of<ref name="GG12" /> the nearly extinct<ref name="UAA" /> species numbering merely 350 individuals.<ref name="GG12" /> Those Tarro who lived in other [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] speculated that the destruction of Til could have been caused by a<ref name="UAA" /> secret<ref name="GG12" /> Tarro-constructed [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]].<ref name="UAA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Til was created by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]] and introduced in ''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG12" />
